svg.text: Supervisor Agent — validates every output, scores confidence, manages retries

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the user submit to start an analysis?')
sendPrompt('What does the Ingestion Agent do in CodeGraph AI?')
g.text: Fetch GitHub archive or validate local path

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Supervisor validate Ingestion Agent output?')
sendPrompt('What does the Scanner Agent do?')
g.text: Walk file tree, apply ignore rules, build manifest

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Parser Agent use worker threads?')
g.text: Babel AST in worker_threads · imports, declarations, metrics

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why is the Parser Agent the highest-weight agent in the Supervisor?')
sendPrompt('What algorithms does the Graph Builder Agent run?')
g.text: Resolve imports · Tarjan cycles · in/out-degree topology

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Enrichment Agent control OpenAI costs?')
g.text: AI summaries · risk flags · cheap heuristic fallback

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What text does the Embedding Agent send to OpenAI?')
sendPrompt('How does the Persistence Agent use PostgreSQL unnest for bulk inserts?')
g.text: Postgres COPY · pgvector embeddings · savepoint tx

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is overall confidence computed from all agent scores?')
g.text: geometric mean · weighted by agent importance

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the completed job return to the client?')
